description: Merge revenue arrangements or revenue elements from multiple sources to represent a single contract for revenue allocation and recognition.

methods.name: mergeArrangements
methods.description: Merges revenue arrangements from multiple sources into a single contract.

params.name: options.arrangementIds
params.description: Array of revenue arrangement IDs to merge

methods.name: mergeElements
methods.description: Merges revenue elements from multiple sources.

params.name: options.elementIds
params.description: Array of revenue element IDs to merge
